revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox |name=Heaven |title= {{ill|Heavenly Realm (Buddhism)|ja|天 (仏教)}}と{{ill|Devas (Buddhism)|ja|天人}} |bodyclass = hlist |image=[[File:Bhavachakra.jpg|130px]] |titlestyle = background:#ffeec2; |groupstyle = background:#FFE4B5 |state = collapsed |group1={{ill|Three Realms (Buddhism)|ja|三界}} |list1={{Navbox|child |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle = background:#ffeec2; |group1={{ill|Formless Realm|ja|無色界}} |list1= *{{ill|Sphere of Neither Per..."
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Devaloka here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name=Heaven |title= {{ill|Heavenly Realm (Buddhism)|ja|天 (仏教)}} & {{ill|Devas (Buddhism)|ja|天人}} |bodyclass = hlist |image=[[File:Bhavachakra.jpg|130px]] |titlestyle = background:#ffeec2; |groupstyle = background:#FFE4B5 |state = collapsed |group1={{ill|Three Realms (Buddhism)|ja|三界}} |list1={{Navbox|child |bodyclass = hlist |groupstyle = background:#ffeec2; |group1={{ill|Formless Realm|ja|無色界}} |list1= *{{ill|Sphere of Neither Perception Nor Non-Perception (Ucca Heaven)|ja|有頂天|lt=Sphere of Neither Perception Nor Non-Perception|lt_ja=非想非非想処（有頂天）}} *{{ill|Sphere of Nothingness|ja|無所有処}} *{{ill|Sphere of Infinite Consciousness|ja|識無辺処}} *{{ill|Sphere of Infinite Space|ja|空無辺処}} |group2={{ill|Form Realm|ja|色界}}
(Eighteen Heavens) |list2= {{Navbox|child |groupstyle = background:#efefef |group1 = {{ill|Fourth Dhyana Heaven|ja|四禅|lt=Fourth Dhyana}} |list1= {{ill|Akanistha Heaven|ja|色究竟天}} {{ill|Sudarsana Heaven|ja|善見天}} {{ill|Sudarsita Heaven|ja|善現天}} {{ill|Atapa Heaven|ja|無熱天}} {{ill|Asaṃjñi Heaven|ja|無煩天}} {{ill|Abundant Fruit Heaven|ja|広果天}} {{ill|Unconscious Heaven|ja|無想天|lt=Unconscious Heaven|lt_ja=広果天#無想天}} {{ill|Punya Heaven|ja|福生天}} {{ill|Cloudless Heaven|ja|無雲天}} |group2= {{ill|Third Dhyana Heaven|ja|四禅|lt=Third Dhyana}} |list2= {{ill|Pervasive Purity Heaven|ja|遍浄天|lt=All-Pervading Pure Heaven}} {{ill|Boundless Purity Heaven|ja|無量浄天}} {{ill|Lesser Purity Heaven|ja|少浄天}} |group3={{ill|Second Dhyana Heaven|ja|四禅|lt=Second Dhyana}} |list3= {{ill|Light-Sound Heaven|ja|光音天}} {{ill|Boundless Light Heaven|ja|無量光天}} {{ill|Lesser Light Heaven|ja|少光天}} |group4={{ill|First Dhyana Heaven|ja|四禅|lt=First Dhyana}} |list4= {{ill|Great Brahma Heaven|ja|大梵天}} {{ill|Brahma Purohita Heaven|ja|梵輔天}} {{ill|Brahma-Kayika Heaven|ja|梵衆天}} }} |group3={{ill|Desire Realm|ja|欲界}} |list3= {{Navbox|child |groupstyle = background:#efefef |bodyclass = hlist |group1= {{ill|Six Desire Heavens|ja|六欲天}} |list1= *{{ill|Heaven of Controlling Others' Enjoyments|ja|他化自在天}} *{{ill|Heaven of Joyous Transformation|ja|化楽天}} *{{ill|Tusita Heaven|ja|兜率天}} *{{ill|Yama Heaven|ja|夜摩天}} *{{ill|Trayastrimsa Heaven|ja|忉利天}} *{{ill|Twelve Devas|ja|十二天}} *{{ill|Four Heavenly Kings|ja|四天王|lt=Heaven of the Four Heavenly Kings|lt_ja=四天王天}} |list2= *{{ill|Four Continents (Buddhism)|ja|大洲#仏教の四大洲|lt=Four Continents}} *{{ill|Eight Hot Hells|ja|八大地獄}} }} }} |group2={{ill|Six Realms|ja|六道}}
{{ill|Four Noble Realms|ja|四聖}} |list2= * **{{ill|Buddha|ja|佛}} **{{ill|Bodhisattva|ja|菩薩}} **{{ill|Arhat|ja|羅漢}} *{{ill|Three Good Realms|ja|三善道}} **{{ill|Heavenly Realm (Buddhism)|ja|天道}} **{{ill|Human Realm (Buddhism)|ja|人間界|lt=Human Realm|lt_ja=人間道}} **{{ill|Asura Realm|ja|阿修羅|lt=Asura Realm|lt_ja=修羅道}} *{{ill|Three Evil Realms|ja|三悪趣|lt=Three Evil Paths|lt_ja=三悪道}} **{{ill|Animal Realm|ja|畜生道}} **{{ill|Hungry Ghost Realm|ja|餓鬼道}} **{{ill|Hell Realm|ja|地獄道}} }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ten}} [[Category:Templates related to Buddhism]] [[Category:Devaloka]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
